# Pulse — Supabase

## Apply schema

Run `schema.sql` via the Supabase dashboard SQL editor or `apply_migration` MCP tool. Safe to re-apply (`IF NOT EXISTS`).

---

## Tables

**`devices`** — one row per app install. UUID generated by the app on first launch; stable across FCM token rotations, resets on reinstall.

| Column       | Type                 | Notes                                                                         |
| ------------ | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `id`         | UUID PK              | App-generated                                                                 |
| `fcm_token`  | TEXT                 | Updated via `onTokenRefresh`                                                  |
| `notify_at`  | TIME                 | Nullable — null = notify at digest-ready time; set = notify at preferred time |
| `user_id`    | UUID FK → auth.users | Stamped after login; nullable                                                 |
| `updated_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ          |                                                                               |

**`user_preferences`** — one row per authenticated user.

| Column        | Type                 | Notes                         |
| ------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------- |
| `user_id`     | UUID PK → auth.users | RLS: `auth.uid() = user_id`   |
| `preferences` | JSONB                | Full `UserPreferences` object |
| `updated_at`  | TIMESTAMPTZ          |                               |

**`digests`** — one row per region per date, shared across all users. Cron upserts on `(region, date)` — safe to re-run. Rows older than `evictDBDays` are deleted before each daily write.

| Column       | Type        | Notes                       |
| ------------ | ----------- | --------------------------- |
| `region`     | TEXT        | e.g. `"Hungary"`            |
| `date`       | DATE        | e.g. `2026-05-16`           |
| `payload`    | JSONB       | `{ headlines: Headline[] }` |
| `created_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ |                             |

---

## RLS

Two-key model: publishable key in the app, secret key server-side only.

| Table              | Rule                                                                                                                                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `digests`          | SELECT open to all (publishable key). Writes via secret key (bypasses RLS).                                                                                           |
| `devices`          | SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE open to publishable key (MVP). SELECT required by PostgREST for upsert RETURNING. See TODO.md V2 for Edge Function upgrade that locks this down. |
| `user_preferences` | SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE restricted to `auth.uid() = user_id` (app publishable key).                                                                                      |
